job_description: Software Engineer in the FinTech sector, I developed robust applications using Spring Boot and Ruby on Rails, ensuring high performance and scalability. I implemented standard engineering practices models with scikit-learn to enhance data-driven decision-making processes. My responsibilities included automating status and payload assertions, which resulted in improved CPU utilization under tight SLAs. Additionally, I focused on stabilizing test fixtures while preserving data consistency, leading to reduced p99 latency for latency-sensitive workloads. This combination of technologies and practices contributed to the overall efficiency and reliability of the systems I worked on.

In my previous role, I developed and maintained a cross-platform mobile application using Flutter, ensuring a seamless user experience across various devices. I implemented data pipelines with Airflow to automate workflows, which significantly reduced processing times and improved data accuracy. Additionally, I managed containerized applications with Docker, enhancing deployment efficiency and scalability. I also contributed to code review workflows, which included establishing CI status gates to improve release confidence under tight SLAs. My efforts in automating release tagging conventions helped maintain predictable costs and improved traceability in our production environment.
